auth.mustChangePassword: You must change your password before continuing.

dashboard.title: Tawjeeh Qalam
dashboard.subtitle: AI-powered annotation platform
dashboard.noProjects: No projects yet. Create your first project!
dashboard.confirmDeleteProject: Are you sure you want to delete this project? This cannot be undone.
dashboard.inviteLinkDesc: Generate a link that allows new users to sign up as annotators.
dashboard.userManagementDesc: Create, edit, or remove system users.
dashboard.createProjectDesc: Start a new data labeling project and choose how you want to import data.
dashboard.noProjectsAdminDesc: Create your first project to start labeling data
dashboard.noProjectsAnnotatorDesc: You are not assigned to any projects yet
dashboard.projectAccessDesc: Assign a manager and annotators for this project.
dashboard.confirmDeleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the project and all its annotations.
dashboard.placeholderProjectDesc: Brief description of the dataset and goals

workspace.title: Annotation Workspace
workspace.notAssigned: You are not assigned to this project.
workspace.askAdmin: Ask an admin or project manager to grant you access.
workspace.hfImportDescription: Enter a dataset id and optionally a config/split. Data is fetched automatically.
workspace.leaveEmptyImport: Leave empty to import the entire resolved split.
workspace.noModelProfiles: No model profiles assigned to this project yet.
workspace.customAIPlaceholder: Enter specific instructions for the AI model (optional)...
workspace.promptHelp: This prompt will be applied to each data point for AI processing. Use variables like {{ColumnName}} to insert dynamic data.
workspace.customAnnotationFieldHelp: Create your own annotation field alongside AI suggestions for custom labeling.
workspace.primaryContentColumnHelp: This column will be displayed as the main content for annotation.
workspace.additionalColumnsHelp: Selected columns will appear in the metadata sidebar.
workspace.reRunAIDescription: The selected models have already been run on all available data points. Do you want to re-run them and overwrite the existing suggestions?
workspace.confirmAIDescription: Review the estimated input tokens before processing.
workspace.pricingNote: OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini use built-in official pricing. OpenRouter pricing is loaded from OpenRouter API. Other providers require manual profile pricing.
workspace.tokenCountNote: Token counts are estimates and may differ from provider billing.
workspace.exportDescription: Exports the current filtered list ({{count}} items).
workspace.csvSpreadsheetDesc: Best for Excel, Google Sheets, and analysis.
workspace.hfDatasetDesc: Best for fine-tuning and machine learning.
workspace.publishToHFDesc: Upload directly to your HF profile.
workspace.publishToHFDialogDesc: Upload your dataset directly to the Hugging Face Hub ({{count}} items). Important fields are selected automatically.
workspace.hfTokenHelp: Get your token from huggingface.co/settings/tokens (must have WRITE permissions).
workspace.publishedSuccessDesc: Your dataset has been published to Hugging Face.
workspace.allAnnotated: You've successfully annotated all {{count}} data points
workspace.greatJob: Great job! Your annotations have been saved and are ready for export.
workspace.uploadFileForTask: Upload a new file to start annotating
workspace.importDataDesc: Choose one import source for your new project.
workspace.importLocalFileDesc: JSON, CSV or TXT from your machine.
workspace.importHFDesc: Load a dataset directly from the Hub.
workspace.browserNoAudio: Your browser does not support the audio element.
workspace.fillFieldsPrompt: Fill in the fields above, then click "Submit Annotation" to mark complete.
workspace.useThisPrompt: Your manual annotation. Click "Use This" to set it as final.
workspace.addCommentPlaceholder: Add a comment for this item...
workspace.browseAnnotations: Browse annotations across all data points.
workspace.noAnnotationsMatch: No annotations match the current filters.
workspace.runPendingItems: Run selected models on all pending items

models.title: Model Management
models.pageSubtitle: Configure provider connections and model profiles.
models.askAdminManager: Ask an admin or manager to grant access to model management.
models.storeAPIKeys: Store API keys and base URLs in one place.
models.bundleModel: Bundle model + connection into a selectable profile.
models.noModelsLoaded: No models loaded yet. Check API key and click Refresh.
models.chooseProfiles: Choose which profiles are available per project.
models.addApiKeyFirst: Add an API key before testing.
models.connectionModelNameRequired: Connection, model, and name are required.

projectSettings.title: Project Settings
projectSettings.pageSubtitle: Configure this project before annotators start working.
projectSettings.annotationFormDescription: XML configuration for the custom annotation form shown to annotators. Leave empty to use the default form.
projectSettings.teamDescription: Assign a manager and select annotators for this project.
projectSettings.guidelinesDescription: Instructions shown to annotators. Supports plain text and Markdown.
projectSettings.guidelinesPlaceholder:
# Guidelines

Describe how annotators should label items...
projectSettings.aiPromptDescription: Optional project-level instructions for AI processing.
projectSettings.aiPromptHelp: Leave this blank to use the default prompt, which tells the model to match the annotation form and use the project guidelines as reference.
projectSettings.iaaDescription: Assign a random portion of items to multiple annotators to measure consistency. Annotators cannot see that an item is an IAA check.
projectSettings.deleteProjectWarning: All data points, annotations, and history will be permanently deleted.
projectSettings.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete the project and all its data points, annotations, snapshots, and history. This action cannot be undone.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.message: Oops! The page you are looking for does not exist.

guidelinesDialog.title: Annotation Guidelines
guidelinesDialog.description: Reference instructions for annotating data in this project.
guidelinesDialog.placeholder: Enter comprehensive guidelines for annotators here...
guidelinesDialog.noGuidelines: No guidelines have been set for this project yet.
guidelinesDialog.savedDesc: Project annotation guidelines have been saved.
guidelinesDialog.saveError: Failed to save guidelines. Please try again.

quality.dialogDesc: Per-annotator performance metrics for this project.

iaa.noIAAItems: No IAA items configured for this project.
iaa.noEnoughAnnotations: No items have enough annotations yet (need ≥ 2).

versionHistory.title: Version History
versionHistory.description: Save snapshots of your project or restore previous versions.
versionHistory.confirmRestore: Are you sure you want to restore "{{name}}"? Current unsaved progress will be lost.

templatePicker.title: Task Templates
templatePicker.noTemplates: No saved templates yet. Build a form and click "Save current form" to create one.

builtinDescriptions.builtin-sentiment: Classify text as positive, neutral, or negative with an optional reason.
builtinDescriptions.builtin-quality-rating: Rate the overall quality of a text on a 1–5 scale with optional feedback.
builtinDescriptions.builtin-ner: Tag named entities in text with their type using a dynamic entity list.
builtinDescriptions.builtin-binary: Simple yes / no decision with optional notes.
builtinDescriptions.builtin-toxicity: Identify whether content is toxic and classify the type.
builtinDescriptions.builtin-summarization: Rate faithfulness and completeness of a summary.
builtinDescriptions.builtin-translation: Evaluate fluency and adequacy of a translation.
builtinDescriptions.builtin-rlhf: Pick which AI response is better and explain why.

formBuilder.invalidXml: Cannot open Visual Builder — XML is invalid
formBuilder.fixXmlHint: Switch to "XML" mode to fix the error first.
formBuilder.noFields: No fields yet — add one below.

annotationForm.noEntities: No entities tagged yet. Select text above to add entities.
annotationForm.noSourceText: No source text available for NER annotation.
annotationForm.nerHint: Select text below to tag entities. Use number keys (1–9) to switch entity type.

welcome.title: Welcome to Tawjeeh Qalam
welcome.description: This quick tour will walk you through the key features of the platform. Use Next to continue or press Esc to exit at any time.

assignedProjects.title: Your Assigned Projects
assignedProjects.description: These are the annotation projects you have been assigned to. Click on a project card to open the workspace and start annotating.

openProject.title: Open a Project
openProject.description: Click Open on any project card to enter the annotation workspace. Your progress is saved automatically.

newProject.title: Create a New Project
newProject.description: Click here to create an annotation project. You can configure the name, description, IAA (Inter-Annotator Agreement) settings, and assign team members.

yourProjects.title: Your Projects
yourProjects.description: All your annotation projects appear here. Each card shows the project name, description, and quick actions like Open, Settings, and Access.

modelManagement.title: Model Management
modelManagement.description: Configure AI model connections (OpenAI, Gemini, OpenRouter, etc.) and manage model profiles used to auto-annotate your data.

userManagement.title: User Management
userManagement.description: As an admin, you can create users, assign roles (Admin, Manager, Annotator), reset passwords, and generate invite links for new team members.

replayTour.title: Replay This Tour
replayTour.description: You can always reopen this tour by clicking the ? button here. Enjoy using Tawjeeh Qalam!

welcome.title: Annotation Workspace
welcome.description: Welcome to the workspace! This tour covers the main controls. Use Next to continue.

progress.title: Your Progress
progress.description: This progress bar shows how many items have been annotated out of the total. Keep going!

navigation.title: Navigate Items
navigation.description: Use the Previous and Next arrow buttons to move between data points. You can also use ← / → keyboard shortcuts.

annotationPanel.title: Annotation Panel
annotationPanel.description: This is where you label each data point. Fill in the required fields and click Accept to save your annotation, or Reject to flag the item.

guidelines.title: Annotation Guidelines
guidelines.description: Click here to read the project guidelines. Always refer to them when unsure how to label an item.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Open the keyboard shortcut reference to speed up your annotation workflow significantly.

replayTour.title: Replay This Tour
replayTour.description: Click the ? button any time to re-run this workspace tour.

header.tagline: Annotation infrastructure for teams that need speed, quality, and control.

hero.title: AI-assisted annotation with humans in the loop.
hero.description: Generate draft labels with AI, review them with people, and run bilingual annotation workflows with stronger quality control.

ai.title: AI-assisted review loops
ai.description: Generate drafts, review outputs, and approve faster.

qa.title: Operational QA visibility
qa.description: Track agreement, throughput, and quality in one place.

aiWorkflow.title: From AI draft to reviewed annotation.
steps: QA teams measure agreement and export results.
aiWorkflow.humanControlValue: Final labels stay reviewable and auditable.
aiWorkflow.operationalValueValue: Teams move faster without losing quality control.

aiMatters.title: More than an annotation interface.
aiMatters.description: Human-supervised automation helps teams move faster without losing control.
items: Generate draft annotations before human review begins.
Compare AI output with human edits.
Keep final labels reviewable and auditable.

systemFit.title: Built for automation and oversight.
systemFit.description: Supports classification, extraction, review, and multilingual labeling.
items: Text annotation with AI drafts and human correction
Image and audio workflows in the same system
Quality tracking tied to real annotation activity

snapshot.title: The product surface, separated from the hero.
snapshot.description: Platform detail lives here so the hero can stay focused.
snapshot.messageTitle: Everything subscribers need to run AI-assisted annotation at scale.
snapshot.messageDescription: Task setup, bilingual collaboration, AI review, and measurable QA in one product.

cards.label: Workspace modes
cards.description: Move between deep review and broad browsing.

cards.label: AI flow
cards.description: AI suggestions stay visible until humans approve.

steps: Import text, image, audio, or datasets.
Configure labels, fields, guidelines, and model rules.
Review AI-assisted work with comments and progress tracking.
Measure quality and export final outputs.

coreProduct.title: The platform now reflects the actual product surface.
coreProduct.description: The interface now focuses on the tools subscriber teams actually use.

workspace.title: Annotation workspace
workspace.description: Switch between focused review and high-volume browsing.

configuration.title: Task configuration
configuration.description: Build tasks with templates, XML forms, and custom fields.

team.title: Team orchestration
team.description: Assign teams, publish guidelines, and collaborate in context.

importExport.title: Import and export flow
importExport.description: Import datasets and export clean outputs for production.

included.title: Subscriber value stays front and center.
included.description: Clear outcomes instead of implementation details.
items: AI suggestions with accept, edit, and reject flows
Role-based access for admins, managers, and annotators
Annotation guidelines, comments, and in-app notifications
Custom task templates and structured field configuration
IAA dashboards, audit logs, and annotator performance views
Dataset import and export for production-ready pipelines

demo.title: See the workflow in action.
demo.description: Tell us about your workflow and we’ll guide you through the right setup, review, QA, and export flow.
demo.calendarFallback: Demo requests will still be saved even if the calendar link has not been configured yet.
demo.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your annotation workflow, data types, or team setup.
demo.existingSubscribers: Existing subscribers can continue in the app.

footer.copy: Tawjeeh Qalam helps teams run AI-assisted annotation with stronger QA and bilingual collaboration.
